text:
Maybe a novelty, maybe useful for data extraction, but I have made a "Copy as JS" button to exporter which can be pasted in Javascript consoles.

Uses the new "Copy as JS" in <https://observablehq.com/@tomlarkworthy/exporter-2>

Maybe if it researialized inside the other page it should also pull in the parent for local first?!

Unfortunately it doesn't work for a few sites that have content security flags (Linked-in, Hackernews, NOT <http://google.com|google.com>). Dunno if that's evadable, but I do just want it as a novelty for now as I am writing a demo.
